title: To One Who Pledged Her Friendship.
content:
Within this false world we may count ourselves blest,
            If we have but one friend who is faithful and true;
        And so in your friendship contented I'll rest,
            And believe I have found that one blessing in you.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Freeman Edwin Miller delivers a powerful performance in "To One Who Pledged Her Friendship."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
